notes: Intro sequences have just a black screen (space bar skips them) and when exiting the game, a fatal error dialogue appears. Other than that, it ran fine (though my GPU meant I had to lower the detail a bit to avoid frame drops at 1080p - not sure if that's a Proton issue or it's a bit sluggish on WIndows too). Note that its "companion" program, just called Rad Rodgers, doesn't launch at all for me, so this is the one to play with Proton.
title: Rad Rodgers: World One

notes: I've seen some skipable black intro scenes as well, but thought they were black, as I skipped the scenes before - no idea. apart from that the game seems to works excellent ootb without any glitches in max details. only played to the first checkpoint so far.
title: Rad Rodgers: World One
